CustomField.description: Records exactly which answer option the learner selected. Combined with SkillQuestionAnswer__c.IsCorrect__c, Penny knows not only that a learner got a question wrong but exactly which wrong answer they chose. (THIS BREAKS DATA MODEL)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Records exactly which answer option the learner selected. Combined with SkillQuestionAnswer__c.IsCorrect__c, Penny knows not only that a learner got a question wrong but exactly which wrong answer they chose.
CustomField.label: Skill Question Answer
